word: G486 - ἀντιλοιδορέω - antiloidoréō - an-tee-loy-dor-eh'-o - Revile again

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀντιλοιδορέω

- Transliteration: Antiloidoreo

- Phonetic: an-tee-loy-dor-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to revile in turn, to retort railing

- Origin: from G473 and G3058

- TDNT entry: 08:53,5

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G473 and G3058; to rail in reply: - revile again.
